summary: UX Alignment Pack Login Flow Testing completed. Fixed 2 critical bugs (CustomerLoginPage and StaffLoginPage not using auth contexts). All login flows now working correctly - Customer, Staff/Admin, and Partner logins redirect to their respective dashboards.

login_chooser_page.notes: Page loads with 3 role-based login cards (Customer, Staff, Partner). All cards have data-testid attributes. Register link works.

customer_login_page.notes: Login form works correctly. Fixed bug where page used 'token' localStorage key instead of AuthContext's 'konekt_token'. Now uses useAuth() context properly.

customer_login_flow.notes: Login successful, redirects to customer dashboard. ?next= param redirect working correctly.

staff_login_page.notes: Page loads with dark theme branding. Fixed bug where page used 'admin_token' localStorage key instead of AdminAuthContext's 'konekt_admin_token'. Now uses useAdminAuth() context properly.

staff_login_flow.notes: Admin login successful, redirects to admin dashboard with full navigation sidebar.

partner_login_page.notes: Page loads with Partner Portal branding. Form elements have data-testid.

partner_login_flow.notes: Partner login successful, redirects to partner dashboard showing catalog items and fulfillment.

register_page.notes: Redirects to Auth page with Register tab selected. Form has Full Name, Email, Password, Phone, Company fields.

homepage.notes: Loads with navigation, country selector modal, hero section.

services_page.notes: Displays service categories (Printing Services, Creative & Design, Uniforms & Workwear, Installation & Setup).

marketplace_page.notes: Loads with search and filter options. Product cards loading from API.

customer_dashboard.notes: Loads correctly after customer login. Shows orders, quotes, invoices, loyalty points.

navigation_from_login_chooser.notes: Customer card → /login/customer, Staff card → /staff-login, Partner card → /partner-login, Register link → /register - all working.

next_param_redirect.notes: ?next=/services parameter on /login/customer redirects to /services after successful login.

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: Page made direct API call and stored token as 'token' instead of using AuthContext which expects 'konekt_token'
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Changed to use useAuth() hook's login() method which properly stores token and updates context state
bugs_fixed_during_testing.impact: Customer login now persists session correctly and dashboard access works

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: Page made direct API call and stored token as 'admin_token' instead of using AdminAuthContext which expects 'konekt_admin_token'
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Changed to use useAdminAuth() hook's login() method which properly stores token and updates context state
bugs_fixed_during_testing.impact: Staff/Admin login now persists session correctly and admin dashboard access works

critical_code_review_comments: All login pages now properly use their respective auth contexts (useAuth, useAdminAuth)
LocalStorage token keys are consistent: 'konekt_token' for customers, 'konekt_admin_token' for admin/staff, 'partner_token' for partners
All login pages have proper data-testid attributes for automated testing
Route guards (CustomerRoute, AdminRoute) work correctly after context-based login

mocked_apis.note: Resend email service and KwikPay payment service are MOCKED (awaiting credentials)

context_for_next_testing_agent: UX Alignment Pack login flows fully tested and working. All 3 login types (Customer, Staff, Partner) redirect correctly. CustomerLoginPage and StaffLoginPage now use proper auth contexts. Register page shows Auth component with Register tab. Homepage, Services, and Marketplace pages load correctly.
